title: DuPont to Participate at the Credit Suisse Global Industrials Conference
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Nov. 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ed Breen, Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, and Lori Koch, Chief Financial Officer, will participate in a fireside chat at the Credit Suisse Global Industrials Conference on Thursday, December 1 st from 8:45 a.m.

title: California sues 3M, DuPont over toxic 'forever chemicals'
text: California's attorney general on Thursday sued 3M Co, DuPont de Nemours Inc and several other companies to recoup the "staggering" clean-up costs from toxic pollutants known as "forever chemicals."

title: California sues 3M, Dupont, 16 other companies over ‘forever chemicals' that taint water
text: SAN FRANCISCO — A lawsuit filed Thursday by the state of California accuses 3M, Dupont and 16 smaller companies of covering up the harm caused to the environment and the public from chemicals manufactured by the firms that have over decades found their way into waterways and human bloodstreams.

title: Making Sense of the Earnings Picture and Estimate Revisions
text: Looking at 2022 Q3 as a whole, total S&P 500 earnings are currently expected to be up +1.5% from the same period last year on +11.4% higher revenues. Excluding contributions from the Energy sector, Q3 earnings for the rest of the index would be -6.0%

title: Dupont De Nemours, Inc. (DD) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Dupont De Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Christopher Mecray - VP, IR Edward Breen - CEO & Executive Chairman Lori Koch - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Jeffrey Sprague - Vertical Research Scott Davis - Melius Research Charles Tusa - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Daniel Rizzo - Jefferies Stephen Byrne - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho Securities John Roberts - Crédit Suisse John McNulty - BMO Capital Markets Aleksey Yefremov - KeyBanc Capital Markets Frank Mitsch - Fermium Research David Begleiter - Deutsche Bank Michael Leithead - Barclays Bank Arun Viswanathan - RBC Capital Markets Joshua Spector - UBS Michael Sison - Wells Fargo Securities Operator Good day, and welcome to DuPont's Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Please note, today's conference is being recorded.

title: DuPont de Nemours (DD) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.23% and 1.53%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Cost Inflation Is a Problem for DuPont. The Stock Rises Anyway After Solid Earnings.
text: DuPont trims guidance as cost inflation continues to impact profit margins.

title: DuPont stock up 2% premarket after company beats on earnings and backs full-year guidance
text: DuPont de Nemours Inc. stock DD, -0.31% rose 2% in premarket trade Tuesday, after the chemicals giant beat third-quarter earnings estimates and reaffirmed its full-year guidance. The company posted net income of $367 million, or 73 cents a share, for the quarter, down from $391 million, or 75 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: DuPont Reports Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: Announces Approval of $5.0 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization Third Quarter 2022 Highlights 3Q Net Sales of $3.3 billion increased 4%; organic sales increased 11% versus year-ago period 3Q GAAP Income from continuing operations of $359 million; operating EBITDA of $856 million increased 5% versus year-ago period Operating EBITDA margin increased 30 basis points year-over-year 3Q GAAP EPS from continuing operations of $0.69; adjusted EPS of $0.82 increased 4% versus year-ago period; higher tax rate was a $0.05 headwind versus previously issued guidance ~$415 million of capital returned to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends Transaction and Capital Allocation Updates M&M Divestiture to Celanese closed on November 1 with gross cash received of $11.0 billion Rogers Corporation transaction terminated on November 1 due to lack of receipt of regulatory clearance Announces Board approval of new $5.0 billion share repurchase program with intended $3.25 billion accelerated share repurchase program to be executed imminently Announces intent to retire $2.5 billion of Senior Notes due in November 2023 as part of balanced capital allocation framework WILMINGTON, Del. , Nov. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced financial results(1) for the third quarter of 2022.

title: Why Rogers Stock Tanked Again on Thursday
text: Investors are really taking the cancellation of the DuPont deal hard.

title: DuPont Scraps Deal to Buy Rogers After Failing to Win Regulatory Clearance
text: The deal was among several aimed to position company for growth.

title: Dupont ends $5.2 billion deal to buy Rogers Corp.
text: DuPont de Nemours Inc. DD, +2.62% said late Tuesday it has ended its deal to buy Arizona-based engineered-materials maker Rogers Corp. as the companies could not get "timely clearance" from all the required regulators. DuPont is paying Rogers a termination fee of $162.5 million in accordance with the agreement.

title: DuPont Announces Termination of Intended Rogers Acquisition
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Nov. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced the termination of the previously announced agreement 1  to acquire the outstanding shares of Rogers Corporation, as the companies have been unable to obtain timely clearance from all the required regulators.

title: Analysts Estimate DuPont de Nemours (DD) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: DuPont Joins Semiconductor Climate Consortium as a Founding Member
text: WILMINGTON, Del., Nov. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it has joined the Semiconductor Climate Consortium (SCC) as a Founding Member.

title: DuPont Completes M&M Divestiture to Celanese
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Nov. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE:DD) today completed the previously announced divestiture of the majority of its former Mobility & Materials segment (the "M&M Business" or the "M&M Divestiture") to Celanese for a purchase price of $11 billion in cash, subject to customary transaction adjustments in accordance with the transaction agreement dated February 17, 2022.
